---
title: "Daniel Flores Orozco"
image: "images/Avatar3.png"

about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-flores-orozco-06645378/
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/floresod
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=LxuXcX8AAA
      target: _blank
---


## Welcome to my personal website bio-bytes

I work in **bioinformatics, data analysis, and R programming**.

I build:

- reproducible data pipelines in R
- Shiny apps
- biological data analyses

---

## Featured work

- Microbiome analyses
- AMR analysis workflows  
- Multi-Omics data integration
- R-based reporting systems  

---
